g.text: FSM: Block Comment Scanning /* ... */ with Unterminated Detection
peek '/' | advance '/' | → CLOSED: return, no token
INVARIANT: advance() is the ONLY place line/column updates
NON-NESTING: '/* /* */' ends at the FIRST '*/' — depth counter NOT used
ERROR position = token_start_line/col (opening '/*'), not current pos
Example: '/** hello **/' — second '*' re-enters SEEN_STAR on next iteration
